---
title: "Chief Investment Officer NextGen"
subtitle: "Class of 2023"
author: "John W. Pearce, CFA"
date: 2023-08-31
categories: [Pension Funds, Honors, Interviews]
---

I was named as a "rising star" by Chief Investment Officer magazine in its Class of 2023 NextGens. I provided responses to six questions that were later published.

# Read the Full Interview

My interview can be found here: [John Pearce - CIO Class of 2023 NextGen](https://www.ai-cio.com/lists/class-of-2023-nextgen/).

[![](cio_nextgen_image.png)](https://www.ai-cio.com/lists/class-of-2023-nextgen/)

````{=html}
<!--
```{=html}

<iframe src="uk_pension_stress.pdf" title="Embedded PDF Viewer" width="100%" height="500px">
    <p>Your browser does not support iframes. <a href="ten_lessons.pdf">Download the PDF</a>.</p>
</iframe>
```
-->
````
